channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Senator Booker says he 'absolutely expects' more Republican resistance to Trump
item.description: Democratic Senator Cory Booker stated he anticipates increased Republican opposition to Trump's agenda following his push for an anti-weaponization fund, among other...

item.title: Watch: Unexplained loud booms reported along East Coast
item.description: Residents from New England to South Carolina have reported hearing mysterious loud booms over recent days.

item.title: Zelenskyy accuses Russia of abducting Ukrainian children for military training
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy has made the allegation for the first time, which could amount to a war crime.

item.title: Diver recounts emotional moment miners emerged from Laos cave
item.description: Lead rescue diver Mikko Paasi said it took him a moment to realize the four trapped miners had escaped on their own.
